notes: Design-time image2 targets for the minimal meeting assistant UI. Runtime currently uses lightweight PNG placeholders so the app remains runnable without extra encoders; replace with WebP files at the same semantic paths when image2 output is available.

assets.image2_prompt: Seamless very light warm paper and frosted grain texture for a professional meeting notes app, almost white, low contrast, no visible illustration, no gradient, no text, no icons.
Extremely subtle monochrome audio waveform and spectrum line texture on warm off-white background, quiet enterprise tool aesthetic, no neon, no strong contrast, no text.
Minimal abstract document and sound-wave texture for empty state, warm gray paper, sparse fine lines, calm business software tone, no character illustration, no map navigation, no text.

assets.usage: Transcript speaker avatars, mapped by speaker id and role keywords.
assets.image2_prompt: 4x2 sprite sheet of eight professional meeting participant avatars: young male, young female, middle-aged male, middle-aged female, elderly male, elderly female, manager, board chairman. Consistent semi-flat 3D illustration, office-appropriate, no text or logos.

assets.usage: Home page hero background photo above the meeting list.
assets.image2_prompt: Photorealistic modern office meeting room table with a small audio recorder, notebook, pen, muted laptop edge and soft daylight, no people faces, no text, no logos, wide 16:9 composition.

assets.usage: Full-screen app launch page shown before the main home screen. Flutter overlays exact text '卓哥制作'.
assets.image2_prompt: Portrait cinematic planet-from-space launch background for a meeting recording app, quiet star field, Earth-like horizon in lower third, subtle audio waveform arc, no text, no logos, no brand references.
